core_philosophy.fusion: Mix 'Luxury Editorial' with 'High-Performance Fintech'. Think Vogue meets Bloomberg Terminal.
core_philosophy.content_first: Data is the star. Chrome is minimal but expensive.
core_philosophy.negative_space: Use whitespace as a luxury material. Don't crowd the data.

anti_patterns: Centered text where it should be left-aligned for scanning.
general_guidelines.testing_requirement: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='kpi-card-revenue').

usage_rules: Use 'Playfair Display' for all section titles and big impact statements.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL numeric data, prices, percentages, and dates.
Use 'Inter' for UI labels, body text, and navigation.
Headings should be TIGHT (tracking-tight). Numbers should be clear.

layout_structure.container: w-full max-w-[1600px] mx-auto p-6 md:p-8 space-y-8

elements: Right: Controls (Date Range, Theme Toggle, Notifications, User Avatar)

left_column.content: Hero Chart (Revenue Trend with Tabs). Height: h-[400px]

right_column.content: KPI Stack. Vertical flex or grid of 4 cards. Total Revenue (Top), Win Rate (Ring), Active Pipeline, Deals Won.

column_1.content: Pipeline Funnel (Vertical Bar Chart or Funnel Viz)

column_2.content: Top Agents Leaderboard (Table with Avatars and Trend Sparklines)

bottom_fold.card_2: Win Rate by Sector (Radar or Polar Grid)

cards.base: rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.header: flex justify-between items-center mb-4 p-6 pb-0

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-6 py-2 font-medium hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity
buttons.outline: rounded-full border border-border bg-transparent hover:bg-muted transition-colors

charts.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines (vertical). Use custom tooltips (glassmorphism).

sidebar.style: Fixed left. Collapsible. Glassmorphism background. Border-r border-border/50.
sidebar.state: Expanded by default on desktop, icon-only on tablet.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Implement the 'High Contrast Luxury' theme in 'tailwind.config.js' and 'index.css'. Use CSS variables.
3. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to 'index.css'. Update Tailwind font families.
4. LAYOUT: Build the 'Hero Fold' first. Ensure the Revenue Chart is the dominant visual anchor.
5. COMPONENTS: Create a reusable 'DashboardCard' component with the glassmorphism styles.
6. CHARTS: Create a 'ChartContainer' component that handles the responsive sizing and tooltip styles.
7. SIDEBAR: Ensure it collapses smoothly to icons only. Use 'framer-motion' for the width transition.
8. DATA: Hardcode all the provided data in a 'data.js' or 'constants.js' file. DO NOT simulate API calls.
9. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to every card, button, and input.
10. POLISH: Add entrance animations (staggered fade-in) for all cards.

universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios (4.5:1) are met. Use darker grays for text, never light gray on white.
